---
title: "Tables in R - Data frames and tibbles"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" width="780" height="500" src="slides/data-tibbles.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/data-tibbles.html){target="_blank"} &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="slides/data-tibbles.pdf" download>Download PDF slides</a>

# Task

Go to the [task page](tasks/data-tibbles.qmd) for the exercises.
